query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count!"
            FROM leases
            WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
              AND (
                ($2 = 'landlord' AND landlord_id = $1)
                OR ($2 = 'tenant' AND $1 = ANY(tenant_ids))
                OR ($2 = 'both' AND (landlord_id = $1 OR $1 = ANY(tenant_ids)))
              )
              AND ($3::text IS NULL OR status = $3)
